sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88219" key="propa/laios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προπάλαιος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n88219.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very old,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οἶνος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:5:33:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.33.1</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἔλαιον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg015:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.14</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
